steps.title: Set up
steps.content: Distribute $6x$ across $(x + 3)$ using the distributive property.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to match the computed result to the answer choices. The value or equation found above matches choice B, $6x^2 + 18x$. The other choices do not satisfy the same condition from the question, so B is correct.
